title: oncidium citrinum
intro: Oncidium citrinum, also known as the Lemon Oncidium, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and unique fragrance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oncidium citrinum include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
